tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh ooh ooh,ooh,ooh yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
I've been doing my own thing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Love has always had a way of having bad timing[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
But to my great surprise, ever since I looked in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
I had one question for you[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me if you want me to    give you all my time[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I wanna to make it good for you 'cause you blow my mind[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I promise, boy, that I'll be true, you're the perfect find[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
So tell me if you want me to, yeah[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
If you've thought I'd sleep on this[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                            [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Boy, you're wrong cause all I dream about is our first kiss[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
And you're the first one to make me feel like this[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
And this is one opportunity that I can't miss, no, no[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Boy, you wanna know the deal[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
You are wondering if the words I'm saying are for real[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause you got more appeal than any man in this whole world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
And baby, I got to know how you feel, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me if you want me to give you all my time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I wanna to make it good for you 'cause you blow my mind[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I promise, boy, that I'll be true, you're the perfect find[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
So tell me if you want me to[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]A7b9[/ch]
Sweetheart, now it's time I let you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]A7b9[/ch]
I don't wanna rush, we should take it slow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]A7b9[/ch]
Boy, I can love you, can you help me grow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                          [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]              [ch]A7[/ch]
Give me a new beginning and I'll give you a happy ending[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
All my love,please tell me if you want me to[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
(I want you to, I want you tchu doo doo)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I wanna make it good, I wanna make it good to you, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh, oh, yeah[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
So won't you tell me,  tell me oh, ow, ow, ow, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Oh ow, ow, ow, baby    um, um, um, um, um[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I promise, girl, that I'll be true, ohow, ow, ow[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me if you want me to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me if you want me to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Boy, I wanna make it good for you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
I promise, girl, that I'll be true[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me if you want me to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell me if you want me to[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
I promise, girl, that I'll be true[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I really really want to[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
I promise, girl, that I'll be true[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
So tell me if you want me to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]
Tell me[/tab]
